sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_replace (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_replace (id, text) VALUES (1, 'hello world');
UPDATE test_replace SET text = replaceAll(text, 'world', 'clickhouse') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, replaceAll(text, 'hello', 'hi') AS updated_text FROM test_replace;
SELECT text FROM test_replace WHERE text LIKE '%clickhouse%';
